diagram_title: Apply Patch Observability — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: Shared session runtime for tool execution and TUI rendering.

containers.name: Session TUI
containers.description: Renders session tool cards from synced state.

components.name: ApplyPatchTool
components.description: Parses patches, applies file changes, and emits phased metadata.

components.name: Tool Metadata Channel
components.description: Running-state metadata transport for tool parts.

components.name: ToolPart Renderer
components.description: Maps part state metadata into tool-specific renderers.

components.name: ApplyPatch Card Renderer
components.description: Renders running and completed apply_patch cards.

components.name: Completed Review Surface
components.description: Diff and diagnostics review UI after completion.

relationships.description: hydrates running metadata into renderer props
